title: rubus reduncus
intro: Rubus reduncus, also known as the Indian strawberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that produces edible red fruits. Traditionally, Rubus reduncus has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts and fruits are believed to provide various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Rubus reduncus is often prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or powder for its medicinal uses, and can also be consumed raw or added to various recipes for its flavor and nutritional value.
